message:
chore(release): bump version to 1.1.0

This release includes 118 commits since v1.0.1 with significant improvements:

## New Features
- Comprehensive test coverage tracking and reporting system
- E2E test framework with logging and isolation
- Test log viewer/filter tool for debugging test failures
- Automatic flock installation prompt when required

## Bug Fixes
- Installer self-refresh and lock cleanup robustness
- Remove flock dependency from installer (portable mkdir locking)
- Variable shadowing fixes in resolve_repo_spec, parse_stream_json_event,
  get_worktree_path functions
- Worktree lock mapping and repo ID normalization
- Prune delete confirmation prompt hang resolved
- Stream separation improvements for installer robustness
- Printf used for safer output handling

## Documentation
- Expanded README with 600+ lines covering:
  - GraphQL batch querying (50x API efficiency)
  - Rate-limit governor with circuit breaker
  - Quality gates with auto-detection
  - Session health monitoring
  - Claude Code integration
  - GitHub Actions execution
  - Review metrics and analytics

## Testing
- 58 test files covering unit, integration, and E2E scenarios
- Quality gates tests, metrics tests, worktree tests
- Stream-JSON parsing tests, gh_actions tests
- Comprehensive driver interface tests
- Error handling and recovery tests

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
